message:
feat(polyfills): complete Node.js crypto, fs, http, os polyfills

Phase 2 Native Polyfill Gaps implementation:

Crypto (crypto.zig, crypto.js):
- RSA sign/verify with PKCS#1 v1.5 and SHA-256
- RSA encrypt/decrypt with PKCS#1 v1.5 type 2 padding
- ECDSA P-256 sign/verify/keygen using std.crypto.ecc.P256
- P-256 ECDH key exchange (p256ComputeSecret)
- SHA3-256/384/512 hash algorithms
- Blake2b256/512, Blake2s256 hash algorithms
- PEM to DER conversion moved from JS to Zig

Compression (compression.zig):
- Brotli compress/decompress using libbrotli
- Gzip/deflate using libdeflate

File System (fs.js):
- fs.promises complete API with FileHandle
- read/write/readv/writev standalone functions
- readdirSync with recursive option (BFS traversal)

HTTP/HTTPS (http.js, https.js):
- ClientRequest class with streaming support
- HTTPS module wrapping fetch with TLS

Other:
- assert.rejects/doesNotReject async methods
- os.networkInterfaces with IPv6 and MAC addresses
- util.inspect with depth/colors/showHidden options
- URL.canParse polyfill
